faqItems.question: What is the Credit Card journey process?
faqItems.answer: Our credit card application process is 100% digital. Simply enter your mobile number, verify with OTP, select a card that suits your needs, and complete the verification process. You can track your application status in real-time.

faqItems.question: What documents are required?
faqItems.answer: For most cards, you only need your PAN card and Aadhaar-linked mobile number. Some premium cards may require additional income proof documents.

faqItems.question: How long does approval take?
faqItems.answer: Most applications are approved instantly. In some cases, additional verification may take 24-48 hours. You'll receive SMS updates on your application status.

faqItems.question: What is the minimum income requirement?
faqItems.answer: Income requirements vary by card. Basic cards start from ₹10,000 monthly income, while premium cards may require ₹1 lakh or more. We show you cards you're most likely to qualify for.

faqItems.question: Can I have multiple credit cards?
faqItems.answer: Yes, you can hold multiple credit cards. However, ensure you can manage repayments across all cards to maintain a healthy credit score.
